weeks.alt: Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a curled fetus at 23 weeks inside a heart-shaped translucent womb with teal outlines and pastel accents.
weeks.caption: Breathing movements are being practised, and the baby's limbs are now in proportion.

weeks.alt: Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a curled fetus at 24 weeks inside a heart-shaped translucent womb with teal outlines and pastel accents.
weeks.caption: The lungs are still maturing, while movement and growth continue week by week.

weeks.alt: Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a curled fetus at 25 weeks inside a heart-shaped translucent womb with teal outlines and pastel accents.
weeks.caption: Your baby may respond to familiar sounds and spends time in changing sleep cycles.

weeks.alt: Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a curled fetus at 26 weeks inside a heart-shaped translucent womb with teal outlines and pastel accents.
weeks.caption: Lung development continues as the body becomes more active and rounded.

weeks.alt: Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a curled fetus at 27 weeks inside a heart-shaped translucent womb with teal outlines and pastel accents.
weeks.caption: Movement is active as your baby keeps growing and maturing.

weeks.alt: Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a curled fetus at 28 weeks inside a heart-shaped translucent womb with teal outlines and pastel accents.
weeks.caption: Eyelids can open around this stage, while the brain and lungs continue to mature.

weeks.alt: Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a curled fetus at 29 weeks inside a heart-shaped translucent womb with teal outlines and pastel accents.
weeks.caption: Growth and lung development continue through this high-growth stretch.

weeks.alt: Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a curled fetus at 30 weeks inside a heart-shaped translucent womb with teal outlines and pastel accents.
weeks.caption: Your baby continues gaining weight and practising coordinated movement.

weeks.alt: Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a curled fetus at 31 weeks inside a heart-shaped translucent womb with teal outlines and pastel accents.
weeks.caption: Brain growth, movement, and preparation for birth continue.

weeks.alt: Friendly flat-cartoon illustration of a curled fetus at 32 weeks inside a heart-shaped translucent womb with teal outlines and pastel accents.
weeks.caption: The lungs keep developing, and many babies begin moving toward a head-down position.
